welcome.title: ClawOne
welcome.subtitle: One-Click OpenClaw Installer
welcome.description: Welcome to ClawOne. This wizard will guide you through setting up your AI-powered automation platform.

environment.title: Environment Check
environment.description: Checking your system for required dependencies. Please ensure all items are installed before continuing.

install.title: Install OpenClaw
install.description: Click the button below to install OpenClaw globally on your system. This may take a few minutes.

step1.title: Configuration - Step 1
step1.description: Choose an official OpenClaw authentication method
step1.ollamaInfo: Ollama runs models locally on your machine. Make sure you have Ollama installed and running.

step2.title: Configuration - Step 2
step2.description: Enter the credentials required by the selected official auth flow
step2.selectAuthFirst: Select an auth method in Step 1 before entering credentials.

step3.title: Configuration - Step 3
step3.workspaceInfo: This is where OpenClaw will store its data and logs.
step3.defaultInfo: The default workspace location is recommended for most users. You can change this later in the configuration file.

step4.title: Configuration - Step 4
step4.description: Pick from the official OpenClaw channel catalog and review the setup path for each channel.
step4.catalogInfo: {{count}} supported channels are visible here so the ClawOne wizard matches the official OpenClaw list.
step4.optionalInfo: ClawOne writes valid channel stubs into OpenClaw and preserves your setup notes. Channels that rely on QR login, plugins, or manual credentials still require the official follow-up flow.
step4.groupWarningTitle: Group traffic can still be blocked
step4.groupWarningBody: This channel is set to allowlist group traffic, but the group allowlist is still empty. Official OpenClaw defaults can silently drop group messages until you fill the allowlist or switch the policy to Open.

dashboard.title: ClawOne Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your OpenClaw installation is complete and ready to use!
dashboard.setupCompleteInfo: OpenClaw is now installed and configured. You can start the service above or run
dashboard.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall OpenClaw from this machine?
dashboard.configUrlPrompt: Paste the JSON config URL to download:

navigation.shellTitle: Control the full setup from one place
navigation.shellDescription: Move left-to-right through install, configuration, and channel onboarding without losing context.

pluginManager.title: Plugin Manager
pluginManager.description: Manage the actual OpenClaw plugin runtime. Bundled plugins can be enabled directly; external plugins can be installed by package spec.
pluginManager.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall
